title: Cyberpunk Rainy Street
summary: Noir science-fiction Tokyo street at night - neon reflections on wet pavement.
prompt: A moody noir science-fiction cyberpunk Tokyo street at night, viewed from a low angle. Wet pavement reflecting vibrant neon signs in magenta, electric blue, and acid green. Tall skyscrapers vanish upward into mist. Holographic advertisements project above the street. A lone figure with a translucent umbrella walks away from the camera, silhouetted against the neon glow. Heavy atmospheric rain, cinematic film-still composition, ultra-detailed.
